nasb.text: “The Levitical priests, the whole tribe of Levi, shall have no portion or inheritance with Israel; they shall eat the Lord’s offerings by fire and His portion.

esv.text: “The Levitical priests, all the tribe of Levi, shall have no portion or inheritance with Israel. They shall eat the Lord’s food offerings as their inheritance.

cnv.text: “利未支派的祭司和利未整個支派，在以色列中，必無分無業；他們所吃的，是獻給耶和華的火祭和他們應得的一份。

ccb.text: “利未祭司及其他利未支派的人在以色列不可拥有土地。他们吃的是献给耶和华的火祭，那是他们的产业。
